title: cayratia mollis
intro: Cayratia mollis, also known as the soft vine or wild grape, is a perennial climber belonging to the grape family (Vitaceae). This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits associated with Cayratia mollis include reducing fever, treating digestive issues, and alleviating respiratory problems. Herbal preparations of Cayratia mollis include teas, infusions, and extracts, which are used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
